questions.question: What is a definition according to the lesson?
questions.correct_answer: The shortest description of observable phenomenon, sufficient for understanding by another person.

questions.question: Which of the four ultimate terms has zero dimensions?
What is the key difference between real objects and abstract objects?
questions.correct_answer: Real objects can be directly demonstrated but cannot be described completely, while abstract objects cannot be demonstrated and don't exist but can be described using ultimate terms.

questions.question: What are the two opposite movements described in the lesson?
questions.correct_answer: From reality to abstraction (observe, describe, give definition, assign term) and from abstraction to reality (take term, seek suitable objects in world).

questions.question: According to the lesson, what is the fundament of thinking?
questions.correct_answer: The ability to see invisible behind visible and find visible embodiment of invisible ideas.
